title: Dzaleka Health Centre
description: The primary healthcare facility serving a catchment population of 86,000 people, including 54,000 refugees and asylum-seekers from Dzaleka Refugee Camp and 32,000 local residents from Dowa District. The centre provides essential medical services including outpatient care, maternal health, HIV/AIDS treatment, and emergency services. It stands as one of the most important community infrastructure sites in the camp.
